goal: BUG-1 remove the redundant top-right profile chip; REQ-9 move Invite-friends under Achievements + add an invite CTA where decks are browsed.
done: (BUG-1) meow-coin.js: removed renderAuthAvatar() + its #mt-avatar-chip — the top-right avatar duplicated the bottom-nav Profile tab. The top-right cluster now holds only the coin chip (links to Shop). (REQ-9a) profile.html: moved #profile-referral out of the Activity tab into the default Rewards tab, right after #profile-achievements, so Invite-friends is visible on the first profile page. JS renders by id so no profile.js change; th/profile.html is the flat (tabless) layout where referral already sits directly after achievements, so it's already satisfied — no TH edit. (REQ-9b) decks.js: added an 'Invite friends, earn coins' nudge (EN+TH via pickLocalized) after the Shop nudge on /decks.html, linking to /profile.html (Rewards tab) where the referral panel lives.
verified: node --check meow-coin.js + decks.js. Headless 390px: /profile.html Rewards tab shows the Invite-friends panel directly under Achievements; /decks.html shows the new 'Invite friends, earn coins → Invite' nudge below the Shop nudge.
